allow: Bash(python -c "from engine.respond import fetch_url, assemble_context, generate_response; print\(''respond.py ok''\)")
Bash(python -c "from engine.mcp_server import mcp; print\(''mcp_server.py ok''\)")
Bash(python -c "from engine.mcp_server import mcp; app = mcp.http_app\(path=''/''\); print\(''http_app ok'', type\(app\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import server; print\(''app routes:'', [r.path for r in server.app.routes]\)")
Bash(python -c "from engine.config import AUTH_USER, AUTH_PASS; print\(f''AUTH_USER={AUTH_USER!r} AUTH_PASS={AUTH_PASS!r}''\)")
Bash(python -c "from engine.config import AUTH_USER, AUTH_PASS; print\(''USER:'', repr\(AUTH_USER\), ''PASS:'', repr\(AUTH_PASS\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from engine.respond import fetch_url, assemble_context, generate_response; print\(''ok''\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from engine.mcp_server import mcp; print\(''mcp ok''\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/mcp/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{""jsonrpc"":""2.0"",""id"":1,""method"":""tools/list""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/mcp/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -H "mcp-session-id: $SESSION_ID" -d '{""jsonrpc"":""2.0"",""id"":1,""method"":""tools/list""}')
